summary: Added 'db export' and 'db restore' commands for local store backup and transfer without API calls.
reason: Built-in export hits the live API and returns paginated envelopes — not suitable for dumping all synced data. db export writes one JSONL record per line from local SQLite; db restore loads it back. Also supports SQLite file format via --format sqlite.
validated_outcome: db export of 3,366 meetings produces 3,366-line JSONL (300MB); db restore into a fresh DB recovers all 3,366 rows.
